---
title: "Theresa Louise Binnings"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: T-Binnings-10copy.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/theresa-louise-binnings/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/TLouise-Binnings
---

I returned to science seeking to understand our soil and our food.
Now I'm a STEM student with a love for chemistry, biology, data science, and math — and for the work of creating greater diversity and accessibility throughout STEM.

```         
```
